value_proposition: Help solo developers run a structured agile workflow without a team, by automating the four phases through Claude Code.
scope_boundaries: No real-time collaboration with multiple developers
No native integration with Jira API (paste-based handoff only)
open_assumptions: Users have Claude Code installed and authenticated
Users are willing to confirm phase gates manually

challenge_log.dangerous_assumption: Solo developers will actually pause to answer break questions instead of skipping them.
break_questions: Have you used a workflow tool you regularly skipped steps in?
Would a forced halt make you abandon the tool entirely?
challenge_log.resolution: Acknowledged; monitor sprint 1 retro for skip patterns.

improvement_log: Iteration 1: removed speculative 'enterprise tier' from value proposition
